title: Bitdeer May 2025 Operations Update
text: Bitdeer achieved notable growth in May 2025, reaching a self-mining hashrate of 13.6 EH/s and producing 196 bitcoins, an 18.1% increase from April. The company shipped 1.6 EH/s of SEALMINER A2 units to external customers during the month. The SEALMINER A2 line demonstrated strong output with 9.0 EH/s manufactured total, including 2.9 EH/s sold externally. The A3 series completed testing and became available for pre-order in June, while the A4 development remains on schedule targeting Q4 2025 tape-out. Infrastructure development advanced across multiple continents. Bitdeer energized facilities in Norway, Bhutan, and Texas while pausing Bitcoin construction at its Ohio Clarington site to explore HPC/AI opportunities. A new 50 MW Ethiopian project was secured at approximately $0.036/kWh electricity rates. Cryptocurrency investment firm Tether exercised warrants in May, issuing 5,186,627 ordinary shares and receiving US$50 million in cash as proceeds. This capital injection supports Bitdeer's expansion trajectory toward over 40 EH/s self-mining capacity by October 2025. The company launched AI Cloud services and continues pursuing high-performance computing partnerships, signaling a broadening business focus beyond traditional mining operations.
